simple_types.name: RTC_Day_Of_Week
simple_types.code:
type RTC_Day_Of_Week is (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday,
                         Saturday, Sunday);

simple_types.name: RTC_Month
simple_types.code: type RTC_Month is (January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, …, December);

record_types.name: RTC_Date
RTC_Time

access_types.name: Any_RTC_Device
access_types.code: type Any_RTC_Device is access all RTC_Device'Class;

subprograms.name: Get

documentation.description: This procedure ensures coherent time and date values

subprograms.name: Set
